## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run package` produces a working `.vsix` (tested via F5 / install)
- [ ] New user-facing strings added to `src/i18n.js` (English; pt-br if available)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
